name: Odyssey
collationMethod: US: sequential collation, 10x11 sheets, four common runs (A/B 25 cards, C/D 30 cards); Belgian: striped collation

draft.notes: US pack order: 11 commons, 3 uncommons, 1 rare; foil at end of pack displaces same rarity. Foil basic lands displace a common; non-foil basic lands otherwise do not appear. Belgian printing uses striped collation.

sourceNotes: Large set; also has four variations of each basic land. Printed in English in USA and Belgium. US booster commons: 5 from runs A/B + 6 from runs C/D (orderable). Tournament packs (30 lands, 3 rares, 10 uncommons, 32 commons) documented but not modelled. Foil 1:100 cards. 36 packs per box.
